curation_notes: Registry records available student-synthesis notes and their intended use.
Indexing a note does not automatically promote it into the exam theory matrix.
Original notes stay outside the repository; generated artifacts store hashes, metadata, and short curation decisions only.

notes.label: Anes tabel
notes.candidate_scope: Full-course comparison table across major theory traditions.
notes.promotion_recommendation: Keep as primary broad comparison basis for the matrix.
notes.notes: Strongest high-level source for the four orientation points and cross-theory exam framing.

notes.label: Tabel alle teoretiske retninger
notes.promotion_recommendation: Use text extraction as compact secondary support; defer image content until media review.
notes.notes: Useful cross-check for table structure and comparison phrasing.

notes.label: Orienteringspunkter narrativ
notes.promotion_recommendation: Promote as direct support for narrative orientation points and W12 comparison synthesis.

notes.label: Fænomenologi
notes.candidate_scope: Phenomenology orientation points, method, and comparison with narrative psychology.
notes.promotion_recommendation: Promote as secondary support for phenomenology, especially method and narrative comparison.

notes.label: Fransk psykoanalyse
notes.candidate_scope: French psychoanalysis orientation points, Lacan/Laplanche concepts, and narrative comparison.
notes.promotion_recommendation: Use selectively to sharpen French psychoanalysis inside the broader psychoanalytic row; consider later subtradition split.
notes.notes: Adds theory-specific concepts without needing a new row yet.

notes.label: Humanistisk psyk
notes.candidate_scope: Humanistic psychology orientation points and narrative comparison.
notes.promotion_recommendation: Promote as secondary support for humanistic theory sheets and compact matrix deltas.
notes.notes: Mostly confirms existing matrix; still useful for theory-sheet pilot.

notes.label: Socialkonstruktivisme
notes.path: /Users/oskar/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-Personal/onedrive local/Mine dokumenter 💾/psykologi/personlighedspsykologi/Noter/Noter fra Karla/Socialkonstruktivisme (hører under postpsykologierne).docx
notes.candidate_scope: Social constructionism, discourse, agency, sociogenesis, and narrative comparison.
notes.promotion_recommendation: Use text extraction to sharpen social constructionism and narrative comparison; do not rely on embedded media.
notes.notes: High value for comparison moves; media remains review-only.

notes.label: Poststrukturalisme
notes.candidate_scope: Poststructuralism, Foucault, subjectivation, power, cases, and orientation points.
notes.promotion_recommendation: Use only selective normalized deltas for poststructuralism; keep detailed cases for later theory sheets.
notes.notes: Large and media-heavy; do not let it bloat the master matrix.

notes.label: Trækteori
notes.candidate_scope: Trait theory, HEXACO, culture, evolution, stability/change, and comparison with narrative psychology.
notes.promotion_recommendation: Use selectively for trait/dynamic/biosocial distinctions and narrative comparison; avoid reading-level detail.
notes.notes: Very rich but quote/detail-heavy; best for careful enrichment and later theory sheets.

notes.label: Tysk psykoanalyse
notes.candidate_scope: Classical/Freudian psychoanalysis orientation points and narrative comparison.
notes.promotion_recommendation: Use selectively to distinguish classical/German psychoanalysis from French psychoanalysis inside the broad row.
notes.notes: Compact and useful for later theory sheet; matrix should stay broad.
